name: Spaghetti a La Brindisi
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large saucepan.
2. Add garlic, scallions, and meat to the pan.
3. Cook over low heat for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally until lightly browned. Set aside.
4. Mix tomato paste and water in a large bowl until smooth.
5. Add whole tomatoes, mushrooms, oregano, basil, and pepper; stir well.
6. Add this mixture to the saucepan and cook over low-medium heat for 2-3 minutes.
7. Reduce heat and let simmer for 25-30 minutes.
8. Meanwhile, cook spaghetti in boiling water.
9. Drain spaghetti into a colander.
10. Place portions of spaghetti onto plates.
11. Add sauce and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
12. Serve with red Brindisi wine.
